PropertyString.name: testType
PropertyString.help: Defines the type test, user is configuring. If it just a back to back test, select port to port option.

PropertyString.name: role
PropertyString.help: Defines the role this port group is going to play: If initiator, then p2p/p2d responder only for p2p cases.

PropertyString.name: emulatedSubnetIpType
PropertyString.help: Defines the version of ip address style to be used for describing the range.

PropertyInt.name: numEHCount
PropertyInt.help: The total number of hosts to be created for the for each emulated subnets

PropertyString.name: emulatedSubnet
PropertyString.help: Defines the base address to be used for enumerating all the emulated subnets in the range

PropertyString.name: protectedSubnet
PropertyString.help: Defines the base address to be used for enumerating all the protected subnets in the range

PropertyInt.name: emulatedSubnetSuffix
PropertyInt.help: Defines the length (in bits) of the mask to be used in conjunction with all the addresses created in the range. e.g., a prefix of 24 = 255.255.255.0 for ipv4

PropertyInt.name: protectedSubnetSuffix
PropertyInt.help: Defines the length (in bits) of the mask to be used in conjunction with all the addresses created in the range. e.g., a prefix of 24 = 255.255.255.0 for ipv4

PropertyString.name: esnIncrementBy
PropertyString.help: Defines the increment to be used for enumerating all the emulated subnets in the range.

PropertyString.name: psnIncrementBy
PropertyString.help: Defines the increment to be used for enumerating all the protected subnets in the range.

PropertyString.name: peerName
PropertyString.help: Name of the peer for tunnel creation.

PropertyString.name: peerPublicIPType
PropertyString.help: Defines the version of ip address style to be used for describing the range.

PropertyString.name: peerPublicIP
PropertyString.help: Public IP address of the peer.

PropertyBoolean.name: singlePH
PropertyBoolean.help: Single protected host on responder side.
